title: rubus coarctatus
intro: Rubus coarctatus, also known as the prickly thimbleberry, is a type of flowering shrub native to North America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus coarctatus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Rubus coarctatus often include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
